name: Real Life World RP
description:
Have you ever wondered how life would've been if you were someone else?

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Seeing the love for Medieval Fantasy World RP, I decided to make a modern version of it ^^

I've no idea if u guys would like it, but I think it's pretty cool ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ I've been making sm shitpost anw so it's about time I actually make something good lmao ;;;

Might still edit this here and there in the future, tweaking things bit by bit! If this goes smoothly or maybe even better than Medieval Fantasy World RP, I might even reformat that one using the format I used in this! ^^

We'll see! <3
creator: Mayu0910
